steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The graph shows that project leaders rated urban agriculture's contribution to improvement of local microclimate lower than its contribution to increase in global biodiversity. The blank must complete the sentence "surveyed project leaders rated urban agriculture's contribution to [X] lower than its contribution to [Y]" using two services actually shown on the graph.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘improving the local microclimate than to increasing global biodiversity.’: The graph shows Project Leaders rated improvement of local microclimate (about 3.0) lower than increase in global biodiversity (about 3.5), so this comparison is valid and accurate. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘increasing global biodiversity than to providing tourist attractions.’: Tourist attractions is not one of the three services displayed on the graph for Project Leaders. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘improving community members' sense of attachment to the neighborhood than to offering educational opportunities.’: Educational opportunities does not appear on the Project Leaders portion of the graph. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘increasing global biodiversity than to improving the local microclimate.’: This reverses the relationship — Project Leaders rated global biodiversity higher, not lower, than local microclimate. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
